arts.sum: Ange: "When I was up here, particularly my first year, they made the Europa League final (2022) so I’ve got a pretty clear idea of how challenging it is to play them here in front of that crowd, with the atmosphere but, at the same time, it’s exciting. If we get through to the knockout rounds, they’re the kind of games where is going to be a pretty hot atmosphere and you’ve got to be able to handle that and look forward to it as well because you want to play in games like that."

arts.ttl: Report: 'Exceptional' La Liga star is going to sign for Tottenham in January
Tottenham injury news for Rangers clash amid Van de Ven and Romero update
arts.sum: Cristian Romero, Brennan Johnson and Micky van de Ven were all forced off in defeat to Chelsea to take fitness concerns for Postecoglou into double figures. On his return to action after four weeks out with a hamstring injury, Micky van de Ven appeared to pick up a new muscular issue against Chelsea.

arts.ttl: Ange Postecoglou set for hostile Scotland return with injury-hit Spurs as key defenders wait to discover extent of long-term muscle problems
arts.sum: MATT BARLOW: Ange Postecoglou made his first return to Ibrox since leaving Celtic with a fire extinguisher to hand as Tottenham travel to Scotland in Thursday's Europa League clash.

arts.ttl: Ianis Hagi insider explains the REAL reason behind Rangers recall as loan target 'interest' heats up - Ibrox bulletin
arts.sum: Hagi has impressed since being reintroduced to the first team picture by Philippe Clement

arts.ttl: 'Hearing a reoccurrence of injury': Journalist says Tottenham star could now be out until the New Year
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur are currently in the midst of an injury crisis that is affecting the club on the results front. Spurs haven’t won in four...

arts.ttl: Ange Postecoglou reveals Cristian Romero response after Tottenham and Daniel Levy TV rant
arts.sum: "Hopefully they realise who the true responsible ones are and we can move forward, because it's a beautiful club that, with the structure it has, could easily be competing for the title every year." Unsurprisingly, Postecoglou was asked about what Romero said, with the Tottenham boss explaining why he thinks he made those admissions. "Cristian, he realises that lot of what he said was good but some wasn't the right way of dealing with it.

It was put to Radu that it looked likely that Archie Gray could line up alongside him at Ibrox... We are a group of players with quality that I trust a lot and regardless of any injury problems, we go out there and do our best and try to to play our football."

arts.ttl: Ange Postecoglou: Cristian Romero has said sorry after controversial comments
arts.sum: The comments of Spurs’ vice-captain overshadowed ex-Celtic boss Ange Postecoglou’s first return to Scotland.

arts.ttl: Tottenham's Cristian Romero apologises for Daniel Levy rant as Ange Postecoglou provides injury latest
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur manager Ange Postecoglou reveals that Cristian Romero has apologised for taking aim at the board following Sunday's 4-3 Premier League loss to Chelsea.
